node.text: James plans to return from his trip on July 20 and intends to bring back a souvenir for John.

node.text: James bought air tickets to Toronto and plans to visit Vancouver as well.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 16 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James is interested in extreme sports, recently trying rope jumping from a height of 150 meters and surfing.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 16 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John supports James and expresses gratitude for John's support.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "return from trip") on Observation 6 (Score: 0.52)

node.text: James was glad to hear from John and excited to learn about the impact of the software tool John created for the charitable foundation.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 11 (Score: 0.56)

node.text: James values John's support and friendship, mentioning that John has always been there for him.
James encouraged John to continue using his skills and passions for making a difference.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 11 (Score: 0.56)

node.text: James offered support and encouragement to find the right non-profit organization that aligns with John's values and passion for programming.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "trip Toronto Vancouver") on Session 11 (Score: 0.56)

node.text: James learned that perseverance, patience, feedback, and collaboration are essential in game development.
